# BindPort

> BindPort is a proxy-neutral local development port registry, allocator,
> runner, dashboard, integration-file renderer, and trusted hook runner for
> Linux and macOS development environments.

BindPort wraps local development commands, assigns stable ports, records
project/service/worktree ownership, exposes route metadata, renders text files
for tools such as Traefik, and runs locally trusted lifecycle hooks. It is not a
reverse proxy and does not bind privileged ports, install certificates, mutate
DNS, edit hosts files, install a root daemon, or kill active processes by
default.

## Start Here

- [Why BindPort](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/getting-started/why-bindport.md): Product value, use cases, boundaries, and tradeoffs.
- [Concepts](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/getting-started/concepts.md): Mental model and scope boundaries.
- [Install BindPort](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/getting-started/install.md): npm, Cargo, Homebrew, binstall, mise/ubi, and GitHub Release installs.
- [Quick Start](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/getting-started/quick-start.md): Run a command, inspect status, open a URL, and clean old state.
- [Adoption Setup](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/getting-started/adoption.md): Add BindPort to a project safely.

## User Documentation

- [CLI Commands](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/daily-use/cli.md): Command reference for running, status, cleanup, outputs, dashboard, and hooks.
- [Running Services](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/daily-use/running-services.md): Service commands, args, environment bridging, route metadata, and framework examples.
- [Configuration](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/daily-use/configuration.md): Config discovery, precedence, fields, placeholders, validation, outputs, hooks, and dashboard settings.
- [Monorepos and Worktrees](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/daily-use/monorepos.md): Multi-service repositories, local overrides, and branch/worktree identity.
- [Dashboard](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/integrations/dashboard.md): Local UI, API, service controls, auth, and cleanup actions.
- [Templates](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/integrations/templates.md): Output templates, MiniJinja, built-ins, proxy/env setup, and ownership rules.
- [Proxy Outputs](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/integrations/proxy-outputs.md): Traefik, Caddy, target host selection, Docker/Rancher Desktop, and no-proxy usage.
- [Optional Output Patterns](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/integrations/optional-output-patterns.md): File-based custom output boundaries for TCP alias candidates, Kubernetes/IngressRoute manifests, container workflows, hooks, and JSON bridge patterns.
- [Hooks and Trust](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/integrations/hooks.md): Lifecycle hooks, trust workflow, changed-hook handling, and dashboard visibility.
- [Status and Cleanup](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/operations/status.md): Registry states, JSON status, URL lookup, reservations, and cleanup.

## Reference

- [Security Model](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/operations/security.md): Local-first defaults, config safety, output ownership, dashboard auth, and hook trust.
- [Health and Troubleshooting](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/operations/troubleshooting.md): Diagnostics, common failures, and recovery commands.
- [Platform Support](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/reference/platform-support.md): Supported OS/package targets, paths, process behavior, and CI gates.
- [Status JSON Schema](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/status.schema.json): Machine-readable `bindport status --json` schema; use `bindport list --json` for grouped inventory and `bindport registry export` for debug/backup snapshots.
- [Agent and LLM Setup](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/reference/agents.md): Agent instructions, Codex skill, and LLM discovery files.

## Project

- [Release Process](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/project/release.md): Maintainer release workflow.
- [Docs Site and AI Discovery](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/blob/main/docs/project/docs-site.md): mdBook site workflow and discovery file notes.

## Optional

- [Repository README](https://github.com/bindport/bindport): High-level project overview and development commands.
- [Examples](https://github.com/bindport/bindport/tree/main/examples): Config and monorepo fixtures.
